title: New Activity > Meeting integration with Google Calendar shows up in Military Time
excerpt: I have my Google Calendar integrated and when I create a new activity that is a meeting, the time shows up in military time. My brain doesn’t work in military time. It would be great to be able to change that to 12 hr ti…

posts.author: Holly401 (Holly Walsh)
posts.cookedHtml: I have my Google Calendar integrated and when I create a new activity that is a meeting, the time shows up in military time. My brain doesn’t work in military time. It would be great to be able to change that to 12 hr time.
